full_points.description: 3+ years of dedicated experience as an Accounts Payable Accountant or similar role. Resume clearly demonstrates hands-on experience with all key responsibilities: supplier account analysis, reconciliations, payment scheduling, and document verification.

partial_points.description: 1-2 years of experience in an AP role, OR experience in a general accounting role with some AP duties. Resume mentions some, but not all, of the core AP responsibilities.

zero_points.description: No relevant work experience in accounting or finance, or experience is limited to unrelated areas like Accounts Receivable or sales.

full_points.description: Explicitly states B2 level or higher in both French and English. Demonstrates advanced proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (especially Excel). Mentions experience with SAP.

partial_points.description: Meets the language requirement for one language but not both, OR mentions general MS Office proficiency without specifying advanced skills. No mention of SAP.

zero_points.description: Does not meet the minimum language requirements (B2 French/English) or fails to mention proficiency in Microsoft Office.

full_points.description: Holds a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Accounting, Finance, or a closely related business field.

partial_points.description: Holds a relevant technical diploma in accounting/finance or a university degree in an unrelated field.

zero_points.description: No post-secondary education is listed, or only a high school diploma is mentioned.

full_points.description: Resume includes specific, quantifiable achievements related to AP functions (e.g., 'Reduced payment errors by 15%,' 'Recovered X amount in duplicate payments,' 'Streamlined reconciliation process, saving Y hours per month').

partial_points.description: Mentions achievements but they are vague and not quantified (e.g., 'Improved supplier relations,' 'Helped with process improvements').

zero_points.description: Resume only lists job duties and responsibilities without highlighting any specific accomplishments or impact.

full_points.description: Resume explicitly lists keywords from the job description (e.g., 'detail-oriented,' 'analytical,' 'organizational skills,' 'teamwork'). The document is well-formatted, professional, and free of errors, demonstrating meticulousness.

partial_points.description: Mentions one or two relevant soft skills. The resume is generally clean but may have minor formatting issues or typos.

zero_points.description: No relevant soft skills are mentioned. The resume is poorly organized, difficult to read, or contains multiple errors.

full_points.description: Candidate possesses a professional accounting certification (e.g., CPA, CMA, or local equivalent) OR has advanced SAP certification/specialized module experience (e.g., SAP FI/CO).

partial_points.description: Candidate has significant experience with another major ERP system (e.g., Oracle, NetSuite) or has direct experience in the same industry.

zero_points.description: No additional qualifications beyond the core requirements are listed.
